title: westonia indica
intro: Westonia indica, also known as Westringia indica, is a flowering plant native to Australia. This shrub is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Westonia indica include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues due to its antiseptic and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Westonia indica is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
